en.value:
Activity Cluster 1: Promoting and facilitating the switch to sustainable production. 

	
		Develop cleaner production awareness campaigns through workshops and its wider dissemination through Central Carpet Industries Association (CCIA), Nepal Wool Dyeing Industry Association (NWDIA) and the National Pashmina Industries Association (NPIA) by distribution of information packs.
	
		Undertake assessment of sample production units and develop CP implementation plans.
	
		Lead training workshops for the design, implementation and maintenance of CP techniques for unit owners, managers and workers.
	
		Develop model units for dyeing and washing sub-sectors and carry out cross-visits.
	
		Produce and disseminate cleaner production practice operating manual for carpet dyeing, washing and pashmina operations.
	
		Provide technical support to implement cleaner production activities to the participating industries.
	
		Conduct an assessment of suitable hardware suppliers and explore possibilities or and negotiate group purchase discounts.
	
		Carry out assessment and explore potential of solar water heaters as supplemental energy supply


	 

	Activity Cluster 2: Increased access to green finance to facilitate the switch to Sustainable Cleaner Production by Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs):

	
		Facilitate development of business plans
	
		Develop feasible financial product for SMEs to access appropriate technology in partnership with CCIA and NMB Bank/other financial institutions.
	
		Create and promote suitable financial products through NMB Bank and other financial institutions to facilitate loans to promote energy efficiency activities.
	
		Provide financial literacy and business plan training to target SMEs in the action to ensure successful uptake and management of financial products.
	
		Carry out training activities with local commercial financial institutions to build access to financial services for Cleaner Production(CP) activities


	 

	Activity Cluster 3: Building the capacity of industry stakeholders to promote and reward adoption of cleaner practices at scale:

	
		Build the capacity of the CCIA, NPIA and NWDIA
	
		Build the operational capacity of CP service suppliers to allow them to provide technical services


	
		Work with pashmina association on the promotion of Cleaner Production approaches, including cross-visits with carpet industry.


	 

	Activity Cluster 4: Promotion of policy instruments:

	
		Promote dialogue between stakeholders through a work group between Ministry of Industry, MOSTE, producer associations and trade associations


	
		Create systems to distribute results of CP uptake among initial units disseminated throughout the sector


	
		Build links to knowledge hubs such as existing cleaner production centers in neighboring countries and to SWITCH-Asia Network Facility.


	
		Support the advocacy programme of the CCIA, NWIDA and NPIA aimed at encouraging tax incentives for cleaner production.


	
		Support the Ministry of Industry and the Ministry of Science Technology and Environment in developing enforcement mechanisms for existing regulations.

en.full: Enhancing Sustainability and Profitability of the Carpet and Pashmina Industries in the Kathmandu Valley (Switch-Asia)

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
